_meta.description: Canadian tax deadlines (statutory dates; apply next-business-day rule) — as encoded in the tested engine
_meta.disclaimer: Estimates only, for planning purposes — not tax, legal, or accounting advice. Figures follow CRA-published 2026 rates; your actual return may differ. Confirm with the CRA or a qualified professional before filing.

data.title: RRSP contribution deadline (2025 tax year)
data.desc: Last day to contribute to an RRSP and deduct it on your 2025 return. CRA-published date.
data.prepDesc: Decide your 2025 RRSP contribution and start any transfers now — contributions must land in the account by the deadline, and moving money between institutions can take days.

data.title: CRA tax instalment #1 of 2026
data.desc: First 2026 quarterly instalment for those required to pay. Compute your exact amount: https://freelancertax.ca/tax-instalments-canada/

data.title: 2025 balance owing due (all filers, incl. self-employed)
data.desc: Pay any 2025 income tax balance today even if your self-employed return isn't due until June 15 — interest starts after this date. Estimate what you owe: https://freelancertax.ca/self-employed-tax-calculator/
data.prepDesc: Estimate your 2025 balance owing now and set the cash aside — interest starts the day after the deadline. Free estimate: https://freelancertax.ca/self-employed-tax-calculator/

data.title: GST/HST payment due (annual filers, Dec 31 year-end)
data.desc: Self-employed annual GST/HST filers with a December 31 fiscal year-end: payment is due today; the return itself is due June 15.

data.title: Self-employed filing deadline (2025 return)
data.desc: File your 2025 income tax return (you or your spouse/common-law partner self-employed). Any balance was due April 30. Fill out your T2125: https://freelancertax.ca/t2125-generator/
data.prepDesc: Gather your invoices, expense receipts and bank statements now — a complete T2125 takes longer than one evening. Fill it out free: https://freelancertax.ca/t2125-generator/

data.title: CRA tax instalment #2 of 2026
data.desc: Second 2026 quarterly instalment. Compute your exact amount: https://freelancertax.ca/tax-instalments-canada/

data.title: GST/HST return due (annual filers, Dec 31 year-end)
data.desc: Self-employed annual GST/HST filers: file your return today (payment was due April 30).

data.title: CRA tax instalment #3 of 2026
data.desc: Third 2026 quarterly instalment. Compute your exact amount and compare the three CRA payment options: https://freelancertax.ca/tax-instalments-canada/

data.title: CRA tax instalment #4 of 2026
data.desc: Final 2026 quarterly instalment. Compute your exact amount: https://freelancertax.ca/tax-instalments-canada/

data.title: Farmers & fishers: single 2026 instalment due
data.desc: If your main income is farming or fishing, your one annual instalment is due today.

data.title: T4/T4A slips due for 2026 (if you have employees)
data.desc: File T4/T4A information returns for the 2026 calendar year — due the last day of February.

data.title: CRA tax instalment #1 of 2027
data.desc: First 2027 quarterly instalment (statutory date — CRA reminders confirm your amounts). Compute: https://freelancertax.ca/tax-instalments-canada/

data.title: 2026 balance owing due (all filers, incl. self-employed)
data.desc: Pay any 2026 income tax balance today — interest starts after this date even though the self-employed filing deadline is June 15. Estimate: https://freelancertax.ca/self-employed-tax-calculator/
data.prepDesc: Estimate your 2026 balance owing now and set the cash aside — interest starts the day after the deadline. Free estimate: https://freelancertax.ca/self-employed-tax-calculator/

data.title: Self-employed filing deadline (2026 return)
data.desc: File your 2026 income tax return. Any balance was due April 30. Fill out your T2125: https://freelancertax.ca/t2125-generator/
data.prepDesc: Gather your invoices, expense receipts and bank statements now — a complete T2125 takes longer than one evening. Fill it out free: https://freelancertax.ca/t2125-generator/

data.title: CRA tax instalment #2 of 2027
data.desc: Second 2027 quarterly instalment. Compute your exact amount: https://freelancertax.ca/tax-instalments-canada/

data.title: CRA tax instalment #3 of 2027
data.desc: Third 2027 quarterly instalment. Compute your exact amount and compare the three CRA payment options: https://freelancertax.ca/tax-instalments-canada/

data.title: CRA tax instalment #4 of 2027
data.desc: Final 2027 quarterly instalment. Compute your exact amount: https://freelancertax.ca/tax-instalments-canada/

data.title: Farmers & fishers: single 2027 instalment due
data.desc: If your main income is farming or fishing, your one annual instalment is due today.
